bullet_point.value: Gym Spin Bike Mount with Superior Grip - Strap our gym magnetic phone holder for exercise bikes like Peloton or stationary bikes. Designed to fit handlebars 0.5–1.5” wide, it's the ultimate phone holder for gym equipment and home spin setups.

Ultra-Strong Phone Grip - Built with 17 N52 Neodymium magnets, our magnetic gym phone holder locks your device in place. Perfect for intense rides, treadmill accessories for men, and exercise bike accessories.

Snap to Any Gym Rack or Metal Surface - Equipped with 2 rear magnets, this gym phone holder magnet lets you snap it to squat racks, benches, or cable machines. Making it the best magnetic phone holder for gym and workouts.

Works With MagSafe & All Phones - Compatible with MagSafe iPhones and includes a magnetic ring for Android devices. Your ideal magsafe bike mount, phone holder for Peloton bike, and magnetic phone clamp for gym use.
Mount It on the Move - Perfect as a golf bag phone mount, shopping cart phone holder, stroller phone mount, or grocery cart phone clip. Wherever you move, your phone stays secure.

Compact, Rugged, Ready for Action Small but mighty. Lightweight enough for shopping carts, tough enough for gym racks. Your go-to phone mount for stroller walks, golf push cart accessories, and spin bike phone holder needs.

Not for Outdoor or MTB Use - This magnetic phone mount is designed for exercise bikes, stationary setups, and gym equipment only. Not recommended for road or mountain bikes due to vibration and surface impact.

product_description.value:
Built to Ride. Built to Lift. Built to Move.

Strap it. Snap it. Own your workout. Our Gym Bike Mount with Adjustable Straps for MagSafe is designed for serious movers — whether you're spinning on Peloton accessories, crushing sets at the gym, or strolling with your stroller phone mount.

Magnetic Muscle You Can Trust
Featuring 17 N52 Neodymium magnets for a secure phone grip and 2 rear magnets to snap directly onto metal surfaces, it’s the magnetic phone holder for gym racks, grocery carts, and stationary bikes you've been waiting for.

Universal Compatibility
Built for MagSafe iPhones and easily adapted for Android and other devices with the included magnetic ring. Perfect as your magsafe bike phone mount, stationary bike phone holder, or magnetic phone holder for stroller rides.

Flexible Mounting, Wherever You Train or Play
Strap around handlebars from 0.5”–1.5” or stick to any metal rack. The ultimate magnetic phone mount for gym equipment, golf push cart accessories, shopping cart phone holders, and grocery cart setups.

Compact Power You Can Take Anywhere
Lightweight, rugged, and designed to move with you — from treadmill phone mount sessions to steering wheel phone mount setups, it's ready for any routine.

Upgrade your ride, your lift, and your life with the ultimate phone holder for gym, golf, shopping, and beyond.

product_description.value:
One magnetic grip. Endless possibilities.


The BLAUBECK Magnetic Phone Grip and Stand is built for people who move. With strong magnets on both sides, it connects to your phone on one end and to steel surfaces on the other. Your gym rack, fridge, or file cabinet becomes a hands-free station in seconds.


Use it at your desk, in the kitchen, or while you train. Flip out the kickstand and adjust the viewing angle for vertical or horizontal use. Ideal for workouts, video calls, cooking, content creation, or just staying organized.


Made from durable zinc alloy, this phone stand feels premium and performs under pressure. It’s solid, portable, and easy to snap on or off when you need it.


Compatible with MagSafe for iPhone 12 through 16. Also includes a magnetic ring for non-MagSafe phones and cases.


Use it as a:

  • Phone grip for secure handling while walking or recording
  • Phone stand for hands-free browsing and video calls
  • Magnetic mount for gym machines, kitchen appliances, or workstations

One simple tool. Countless ways to stay connected and hands-free.

bullet_point.value: Engineered for iron, built for intensity Dual-magnet architecture combines 6 industrial N52 magnets on the base for a locked grip onto any iron or steel surface, and 17 precision-aligned N54 magnets on the MagSafe disc for instant, wobble-free phone attachment. Stays locked on squat racks, pull-up rigs, and metal gym equipment through heavy lifts, vibration, and repeated repositioning. No sagging, no sliding, no adjusting mid-set.

Carbon fiber face. Transparent acrylic shell. Chrome finish. This isn't a phone accessory: it's gym gear. The MagSafe disc features a full carbon fiber face encased in a clear transparent acrylic dome with a chrome metallic ring border, a design that matches the premium look of the equipment it mounts on. The alloy ball joint arm and beveled base complete a build that looks intentional, not thrown together.

Every phone. Same grip strength. Zero guesswork. The 17-magnet N54 MagSafe array delivers instant, perfectly aligned snap-on for iPhone 12 through 17. Android phones and non-MagSafe iPhones get the same rock-solid hold using the included metal magnetic ring. No weaker connection, no additional purchase, no compromise.

Made for real metal. Protects what it touches. Designed exclusively for iron and steel surfaces including squat racks, pull-up bars, metal benches, toolboxes, and golf carts. The beveled alloy base sits flush and secure, while the silicone-padded contact surface prevents scratches on your equipment on every mount and dismount.

One-handed angle adjustment. Pocket-sized. Always ready. The precision ball joint arm delivers true 360° rotation and full tilt so you can lock in the exact angle for filming form, recording content, or hands-free viewing between sets. Compact enough to disappear into a gym bag pocket and ready wherever there is metal.

product_description.value:
Your phone doesn't belong on the gym floor.

The Blaubeck magnetic gym phone holder is built for athletes who train hard and expect their gear to keep up, without paying a premium price for it.

At its core is a dual-magnet system designed for two separate jobs. The flat alloy base uses 6 industrial-grade N52 magnets to grip any iron or steel surface with a hold that doesn't budge under vibration, dropped weights, or aggressive movement. On the phone side, 17 precisely aligned N54 MagSafe magnets deliver instant, centered attachment with no drift or tilt.

What sets it apart visually is the MagSafe disc design: a full carbon fiber face encased inside a transparent acrylic dome shell, finished with a chrome metallic ring border. The result looks less like a phone mount and more like a precision instrument, intentional, premium, and built to sit on serious equipment without looking out of place.

For iPhone 12 through 17 with MagSafe, attachment is instant and perfectly centered. For Android and non-MagSafe iPhones, the included metal magnetic ring delivers identical holding strength. Same grip, no extra purchase required.

The precision ball joint arm connects base to disc with full 360 degree rotation and tilt, letting you lock in the perfect angle for form checks, workout content, or hands-free viewing. The whole unit is compact enough to live in your gym bag and ready to mount anywhere there is iron or steel.

Attaches to iron and steel surfaces: squat racks, pull-up rigs, metal benches, toolboxes, golf carts. Does not attach to plastic, rubber, wood, or aluminum.

special_feature.value: Magsafe Compatible, Magnetic Attachment, Adjustable Viewing Angle, Hands-free Operation, Portable Design, Wireless Charging Compatible, 360 Degree Rotation, Compact Size, Non-slip Base, Universal Compatibility

THE PERFECT COFFEE LOVER GIFT: Great as coffee party favors, classroom rewards, goody bag stuffers, teacher appreciation gifts, Secret Santa picks or stocking stuffers. FUN FOR KIDS AND ADULTS ALIKE: Whether you are personalizing your morning cup, setting up a coffee station, decorating a classroom or building a sticker collection, these designs bring a smile to every surface. Kawaii-style artwork and witty coffee quotes make this set a crowd-pleaser for students, teachers and coffee addicts everywhere.

product_description.value: For the person who can't start their morning without a cup of coffee: these 46 glossy vinyl stickers were made for you. Featuring everything from cute kawaii lattes and funny coffee sayings to coffee bean characters, seasonal designs and cozy coffee shop scenes, this set covers every corner of coffee culture in one satisfying pack. Each sticker is printed on premium glossy vinyl with a durable, waterproof coating. Stick them on your water bottle, laptop, journal, tumbler, car or anywhere else that needs a little caffeinated personality. At approximately 2.2 x 1.3 inches each, they're sized to stand out without overwhelming the surface. These make excellent coffee party favors, teacher gifts, holiday stocking stuffers and classroom prizes. Set up a full coffee bar aesthetic with a few well-placed stickers, or hand out the whole pack at your next coffee-themed event. Whether you drink yours black, iced or with a pump of pumpkin spice, there's a sticker in here with your name on it. Add to cart and treat yourself or someone you love to the most fun 46-pack in the coffee aisle.

product_description.value:
Mount Your BLAUBECK Medal Holder Without Drilling!

Say goodbye to tools, holes, and wall damage. These heavy-duty adhesive wall hooks are custom-designed to fit the BLAUBECK Medal Holder – giving you a fast, clean, and secure way to display your achievements.

Each hook features an integrated screw head for perfect bracket alignment and a strong peel-and-stick adhesive backing that holds tight on smooth surfaces like painted walls, tile, or finished wood.

  • Tool-Free Installation – Just peel and stick. No drill required.
  • Perfect Fit for BLAUBECK Displays – Aligns exactly with the screw holes in your medal holder.
  • Heavy-Duty Adhesion – Designed to support the weight of your fully loaded medal rack.
  • 4-Pack Included – Use extras for backup or multiple display setups.

Whether you're a renter, a frequent redecorator, or just looking for a cleaner installation, these hooks are the perfect upgrade for your BLAUBECK medal display.

bullet_point.value: 43 Unique Honduras & Roatan Designs You Won't Find Anywhere Else – This pack is packed with authentic Honduran culture: Roatán, Utila & Guanaja diving stickers, Mahogany Bay & West Bay beach scenes, Pulhapanzak Waterfall, Copan ruins, Tegucigalpa skyline, Comayagua cathedral, Honduras passport, 504 license plate, Honduran lempira bill, scarlet macaws, and the iconic "Baleadas > Tacos" sticker. A true Honduras experience in one pack.

Proudly Catracho – Stickers That Speak Your Language – Featuring fan-favorite sayings like "Got Baleadas?", "100% Catracho/Catracha", "¿Qué pedos maje?", "Made in Honduras", and "Honduran Coffee #1 in the World" — these stickers are made for Hondurans who want to rep their roots with humor and pride.

Matte Finish Premium Vinyl – Waterproof & Built to Last – Crafted from durable matte vinyl that resists water, sweat, scratching, and fading. Whether on a water bottle, laptop, luggage, car window, or phone case, these stickers stay vibrant and firmly adhered through daily use and travel

Perfect Honduras Gift for Every Occasion – Ideal for cruise passengers stopping at Roatán's Mahogany Bay, Hondurans living in the US, or anyone who loves Central America. Great as a Honduras souvenir, gift basket filler, stocking stuffer, or care package addition — affordable and deeply personal

Versatile Size for Any Surface – Compact ~2.2 x 1.3 inch size sticks beautifully on smooth surfaces: water bottles, laptops, travel journals, planners, phone cases, car windows, luggage, and lockers. Clean edges, no sticky residue, easy to apply.

product_description.value:
Carry a Piece of Honduras Wherever You Go.

Whether you docked at Mahogany Bay on a cruise, grew up eating baleadas in Tegucigalpa, or simply have Honduras running through your veins — this 43-pack of matte vinyl stickers was made for you.

This isn't a generic travel sticker pack. Every single design was chosen to reflect the real Honduras — its food, its islands, its humor, and its heart.

What's Inside the Pack:
🌊 Bay Islands: Roatán, Utila & Guanaja diving stickers with sea turtles and coral reefs
🏖️ Beaches: West Bay and Mahogany Bay, Roatán scenic stickers
🦜 Wildlife: Roatán sloth, scarlet macaws — Honduras's iconic animals
🏛️ Landmarks: Copan ruins, Comayagua cathedral, Tegucigalpa skyline, Pulhapanzak Waterfall, Guanaja
🍽️ Food & Culture: Baleadas, Pollo Chuco, Pollo con Tajadas, Sopa de Caracol, ¡Baleada! sticker
☕ Pride: Honduran Coffee #1 in the World, Café de Honduras
😂 Humor: "Baleadas > Tacos", "Got Baleadas?", "¿Qué pedos maje?", Punta dancers
🇭🇳 Identity: Honduras flag, Honduras-USA flag heart, 504 license plate, Honduras passport, Lempira bill, "Made in Honduras" stamp, "100% Catracho/Catracha"

Why You'll Love This Pack:
43 unique, individually designed Honduras-themed stickers
Durable matte finish vinyl — scratch-resistant, waterproof, and sweat-proof
Smooth-surface compatible: water bottles, laptops, car windows, phone cases, journals, luggage, and more
Compact ~2.2 x 1.3 inch size — fits anywhere, looks great everywhere
No sticky residue; clean edges, easy to apply

Who Is This For?
This sticker pack is the perfect Honduras souvenir or gift for:
🌊 Cruise passengers and tourists visiting Roatán and Mahogany Bay
🇭🇳 Hondurans living in the United States who want to celebrate their roots
🤿 Divers and snorkelers who explored the Bay Islands
😂 Anyone who knows baleadas are clearly better than tacos
🎁 Friends and family looking for unique, affordable Honduras gifts for birthdays, holidays, or just because

Stick them on your water bottle, decorate your laptop, jazz up your travel journal, or share them with your fellow catrachos. However you use them, these stickers are a little piece of Honduras you can take anywhere.

product_description.value: Enhance Your Running Display Elevate the way you showcase your running accomplishments with our 20-pack of Vinyl Bib Sleeves, an ideal complement to your running bibs display. Each racing bib sleeve, measuring 9 inches wide by 7.75 inches high, is expertly designed to extend the capacity of your race bib holder, allowing for a broader display of your racing milestones. These bib protector sheets are made from high-quality, transparent vinyl, offering robust protection and clear visibility for your cherished race bibs. The gray framing at the top of each sleeve isn’t just for aesthetics; it's a functional feature, enabling runners to inscribe their race times or special dates, making each bib uniquely theirs. Beyond functioning as mere bib boards, these sleeves adeptly hold race photos and data cards, enriching the narrative of your running journey. Compatible with our Medal Hanger Display, you can accommodate up to 80 sleeves, these additions are perfect for any bib holder for runners, especially those who frequently participate in races. They are not just an organizational tool but a means to create an inspiring and personal visual diary of your running achievements. Invest in these durable, multifunctional, and customizable vinyl bib sleeves today. Take your running bibs display to the next level and keep your racing legacy alive and on full view for you and everyone else to admire and be inspired by.

bullet_point.value: NAIL THE PERFECT CENTER-COURT ANGLE: Stop settling for terrible, distorted corner footage from basic fence mounts. Our market-leading double suction cup features an active lock actuator that mounts securely to the back glass. Meticulously engineered to absorb heavy ball impacts and players crashing into the wall, this premium mount ensures your phone stays dead-center and completely drop-free.

DITCH THE CLUNKY, SPACE-HOGGING TRIPODS: Say goodbye to lugging around massive tripods that clutter the outside of the court and pose a tripping hazard for everyone. This ultra-compact, elite glass phone mount delivers professional-level padel recording without taking up a single inch of valuable floor space.

ROCK-SOLID MAGSAFE GRIP FOR INTENSE MATCHES: Powered by 20 industrial-grade N55 Neodymium magnets, this mount grabs your device with uncompromising strength. It seamlessly snaps to MagSafe iPhones (12 and newer) and includes a premium adhesive metallic ring to deliver the exact same high-end magnetic security for Androids and non-MagSafe cases.

ELITE ALUMINUM ARM FOR PRO-LEVEL FILMING: Cheap plastic mounts vibrate, slide, and snap. We engineered our mount with a highly durable, articulating aluminum arm featuring a dual ball-joint system. This gives you a massive range of motion, making it the ultimate tool for filming for form improvement, analyzing complex movements, reviewing team playing dynamics, and seamlessly livestreaming your best matches.

THE ULTIMATE PADEL ACCESSORY & GIFT: Meticulously crafted by athletes, for athletes. The sophisticated design easily disassembles to slide perfectly into your racket bag, making it an absolute essential and one of the finest padel gifts for men and women. Stop balancing your phone on a water bottle and capture your rallies with BLAUBECK's superior hands-free technology.

product_description.value:
Stop Letting Your Best Rallies Go Unrecorded. If you play Padel, you already know the nightmare of trying to film a match. Propping your phone against your padel bag gives you a terrible floor-level view. Magnetic fence clips force you into the corners, cutting off half the court. Setting up a massive, heavy tripod takes up too much space outside the glass and is a constant hassle to carry. Enter the BLAUBECK Padel Phone Holder. Designed specifically for the elite, fast-paced environment of glass-walled courts, this premium glass phone mount uses a heavy-duty, switch-actuated double suction cup to lock directly onto the back glass. The result is a flawless, professional center-court broadcast angle of your entire match, with zero floor footprint. The BLAUBECK Advantage:
  • Zero Footprint, Maximum View: Reclaim the space outside the court. Get high-end, tripod-quality stability without actually needing a cumbersome tripod.
  • Market-Leading Impact Resistance: Built with one of the most powerful double suction mechanisms available anywhere. It effortlessly absorbs the shock of fast-paced rallies, stray ball hits, and players crashing into the wall.
  • Unrivaled Aluminum Stability: We replaced the cheap, vibrating plastics used by rustic competitors with a solid, articulating aluminum arm that keeps your footage exceptionally smooth and professional.
  • Industrial Magnetic Hold: 20 super-strong N55 magnets lock your phone to the mount. Works flawlessly with MagSafe out of the box, and includes a premium metallic ring for all Android and non-MagSafe devices.
  • Infinite Filming Configurations: The dual ball-joint system provides an incredible range of motion. Adjust tilt, rotation, and configuration in seconds. It is the absolute perfect setup for livestreaming, filming for form improvement, and breaking down team playing strategies.
Stop risking your expensive smartphone on poorly designed clips or basic silicone pads that slide down the glass. Upgrade to the premium BLAUBECK standard and focus on what really matters: winning the next point.

product_description.value:
Perfect Gift for Runners

Our 34-pack of Running Stickers XC is a versatile and fun way to celebrate your passion for running. Designed for cross country runners, marathoners, and track enthusiasts, these stickers are perfect for decorating and inspiring.

Durable and Water-Resistant

Crafted from high-quality vinyl, these stickers are water-resistant and built to last. Whether they’re on a water bottle, car windshield, or any other surface, they stay vibrant and intact even with daily use.

Versatile and Fun for All Occasions

Personalize laptops, water bottles, car windshields, and more with these stylish designs. They’re also a fantastic addition to running-themed parties, serving as unique decorations or fun giveaways for guests!

Perfect Size for Creativity

Each sticker averages 2.8 x 1.6 inches, making them the ideal size for visibility without overwhelming your space. They’re perfect for any surface where you want to add a personal, running-inspired touch.

34 Unique Designs for Runners

This sticker pack features colorful graphics, motivational quotes, and fun illustrations that runners of all levels will love. Whether as a gift or a treat for yourself, these stickers are a must-have for every running enthusiast.
